ast.name: title
ast.target: 切换以标记回合已进行

ast.name: title
ast.source: Check Motivations that have already been appealed to.

ast.name: title
ast.source:
Resolve the Argument using the current state of motivations, pitfalls, etc. 
Requires Power Roll tier to be selected.
ast.target: 使用当前的动机、陷阱等状态解决论点。\n需要选择力量掷骰等级。

ast.name: title
ast.source: If the Heroes mention a Pitfall: Argument fails and the NPC may warn Heroes.
ast.target: 如果英雄提及陷阱：论点失败，NPC 可能警告英雄。

ast.name: title
ast.source: If the Heroes try to appeal to a Motivation multiple times: Interest remains and Patience decreases by 1.
ast.target: 如果英雄试图多次诉诸同一动机：兴趣保持不变，耐心减少 1 点。

ast.name: title
ast.source: If the NPC catches a lie: Arguments that fail to increase Interest will lose an additional Interest.
ast.target: 如果 NPC 发现谎言：未能增加兴趣的论点将额外失去 1 点兴趣。

ast.name: title
ast.source: If the Heroes try to use the same Argument (w/o Motivation): Test automatically gets tier-1 result.
ast.target: 如果英雄试图使用相同的论点（不涉及动机）：测试自动获得等级-1 结果。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 编译模式时出错，函数代码：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析前置元数据时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 下载 DSE 发布版本时出错：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Failed to find canvas associated with markdown context.  Change NOT saved.
ast.target: 找不到与 Markdown 上下文关联的画布。更改未保存。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 Draw Steel Elements 插件。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Draw Steel Elements Plugin unloaded and schema registry reset
ast.target: Draw Steel Elements 插件已卸载，模式注册表已重置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specific release tag to download. Leave empty to download the latest release.
ast.target: 要下载的特定发布标签。留空则下载最新版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directory within your vault to extract the Compendium contents to.  THIS DIRECTORY WILL BE WIPED CLEAN!
ast.target: 在你的保险库中用于提取资源内容的目录。此目录将被清空！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default image to use for creatures in the initiative tracker if not specified
ast.target: 如果未指定，用于先攻追踪器中生物的默认图像

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为映射已弃用，请传递数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unexpected line in effect block, skipping:
ast.target: 效果块中出现意外行，正在跳过：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to find the file to update.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [HMR] Root or manually mounted instance modified. Full reload required.
ast.target: [HMR] 根实例或手动挂载的实例已修改。需要完全重新加载。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [HMR] Something went wrong during Vue component hot-reload. Full reload required.
ast.target: [HMR] Vue 组件热重载过程中出现问题。需要完全重新加载。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Draw Steel 元素：正在下载规则集...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Draw Steel 元素：正在解压规则集...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Draw Steel Elements: Compendium downloaded and extracted successfully.
ast.target: Draw Steel 元素：规则集下载并解压成功。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 谈判已重置为初始状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: 用于 $data 引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The title or description of the feature

ast.name: description
ast.source: The type of the feature (ability or trait)
ast.target: 特性的类型（能力或特质）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用法（例如：“动作”、“机动”、“触发动作”、“反派动作 1”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cost to use the feature (e.g., "5 Essence", "Signature", "2 Malice")
ast.target: 使用该特性的消耗（例如：“5 精华”、“招牌”、“2 恶意”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Type of the ability (Signature or Heroic)
ast.target: 能力的类型（招牌或英雄）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 与特性关联的关键词（例如：[\"魔法\",\"大地\",\"近战\"]）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 距离或区域（例如：“远程 5”、“2 爆发”、“近战 1”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Who or what is targeted (e.g., "All enemies", "One creature", "Self")
ast.target: 目标是谁或什么（例如：“所有敌人”、“一个生物”、“自身”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Metadata for the feature, to be converted to frontmatter in markdown. This field contains key-value pairs that will be rendered as YAML frontmatter.
ast.target: 特性的元数据，将转换为 Markdown 中的前置元数据。此字段包含将渲染为 YAML 前置元数据的键值对。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Effect expression (e.g., "All targets make a Might test.")
ast.target: 效果表达式（例如：“所有目标进行一次力量检定。”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: List of features granted by the effect
ast.target: 该效果授予的特性列表

ast.name: description
ast.source: A creature statblock for a Draw Steel.
ast.target: 一个 Draw Steel 的生物属性块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roles assigned to the creature (e.g., Boss, Minion).
ast.target: 分配给生物的角色（例如：首领、爪牙）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ancestries or types the creature belongs to (e.g., Human, Humanoid).
ast.target: 生物所属的种族或类型（例如：人类、人形生物）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 免疫列表（例如，魔法2，灵能2）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 弱点列表（例如，酸蚀3，神圣1）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Movement types of the creature (e.g., 'climb, fly, swim').
ast.target: 生物的移动类型（例如，'攀爬，飞行，游泳'）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 体型类别（例如，1M代表中型）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Effect when a captain is present.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 特性列表（参见特性架构）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配anyOf中的某个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须精确匹配oneOf中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 意外的块序列指示符与键在同一行

ast.name: text
ast.target: Draw Steel 规则书下载器

ast.name: text
ast.source: Important: The Compendium will download to a specific directory in your vault and delete any files in that directory
ast.target: 重要提示：规则书将下载到您保险库中的特定目录，并删除该目录中的所有文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to reset the encounter data?  All state will be lost including current stamina, conditions, turn tracker, and villain power.
ast.target: 您确定要重置遭遇数据吗？所有状态都将丢失，包括当前耐力、条件、回合追踪器和反派力量。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reuses a Motivation that has already been appealed to
ast.target: 重复使用已被诉诸的动机

ast.name: text
ast.source: NPC caught a lie and is offended
ast.target: NPC识破谎言并感到被冒犯

ast.name: text
ast.source: Argument has already been made (w/o Motivation)
ast.target: 论点已被提出（未使用动机）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Power Roll + Reason, Intuition, or Presence
ast.target: 力量掷骰 + 理性、直觉或魅力

ast.name: title
ast.target: 核心与验证规范元模式
